title: ophrys muscaria
intro: Ophrys muscaria, also known as the fly orchid, is a species of orchid that gets its name from its unique appearance, which resembles a fly. It is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ophrys muscaria include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Ophrys muscaria typically involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or salves for topical application.
